notes.task1: Deleted all 7 extended tool source files. Removed pub mod declarations and register_extended_tools() from mod.rs. Removed SharedCodebaseIndex type alias import. Removed ApplyPatchTool/MultiEditTool test imports and 5 tests that depended on the deleted tools (apply_patch_single_file, apply_patch_multi_file, apply_patch_fuzzy_offset, multiedit_reports_ghost_snapshot_count, extended_registration_is_now_empty, unregistered_extended_tools_return_not_found). Replaced with a simple extended_tier_is_empty test. Also fixed 2 pre-existing compilation errors in crates/ava-llm/: missing pool.clone() in providers/mod.rs:373, and ProviderCredential::default() call in router.rs:195 (struct has no Default derive).
notes.task2: Plugin CLI commands (ava plugin list/add/remove/info/init) were already fully implemented in crates/ava-tui/src/plugin_commands.rs and wired into the CLI via crates/ava-tui/src/config/cli.rs PluginCommand enum and main.rs routing. No changes needed.
